titleStmt.title: SII 26.660: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 660. (A.R. No. 619 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places and built in at the bottom.

It records that the same assembly of Brahmadēyam Viśalūr sold 3 mā of land to a certain Vīdiviṭaṅkan Karuvuṇāyikaṉ alias Piḷḷaiyaḍiyān, which together with a house-site belonging to him was given as tax-free gift to the temple of the god Tiruchchenneri-uḍaiyār.
Among the boundaries a canal named Arumoḻidēva-vāykkāl and Jaṉaṉātavaḷanāḍu are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakkaravattika
ḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa
devaṟku yāṇṭu A
ñcāvatu brahmadeya
m vicalūr paṭṭapperu
makkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsa
bhaiyom tiruccenneri Uṭai
yāṟku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliceytu ku
ṭutta nilam tikku
meṟku Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku
vaṭakku nāṅka ceytu
kuṭutta nilattukku vaṭapārkkel
lai Innāyanār Iṟaiyi
li viḷainilattukku me
ṟku tenpāṟkellai Arumoḻi
teva vāykkālukku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai cipattappiriyattā
ḻvār Iṟaiyili viḷainilattukku ka
jaṉaṉāta
vaḷa m Āka Ivvi
cai yuḷ naṭuvu
paṭṭa koḷari Uyyavantān tiru
ccenneṟi yuṭaiyār koyiṟtapa
yuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mūṉṟumā Inni
la munṟumāvum Innāyanāṟku cantrādi
savitiviṭaṅkan karuvuṇāyikaṉā
ṉa piḷḷaiyaṭiyān peril kuṭivi
laiyāl munpe koḷvittu Ivarkku
maṉaiyuṭpaṭa vilainilam Araiyum
pottakappaṭi mikutik kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka cantrā
dittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭu
ttu Ippiḷḷaiyaṭiyār kaivaḻikoṇṭa kāContinuation built in.
Digital edition of SII 26.660 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
